name: Toast Notification Script
description: Toast Notification Script is a Windows 10/11 tool designed for Intune Remediations to deliver native toast notifications to the logged-on user. It supports weekly reminders, reboot prompts, and general announcements with configurable scheduling, branding, languages, and snooze/dismiss actions. Includes a detection script, configuration validation, and robust logging to support reliable remote remediation.
author: Martin Bengtsson

securityCheck.aiSummary: No malicious patterns detected in Detect-ToastNotification.ps1. The script appears to be a standard Intune detection script that loads configuration (potentially remote), validates feature settings, and exits with appropriate codes. Although remote config retrieval is common in managed tooling, enforce source trust and data integrity. Recommendations: (1) implement allow-list and TLS/cert validation for remote config, (2) optionally verify XML against a schema or signature, (3) strengthen logging/audit trails and avoid leaking sensitive logging in logs, and (4) maintain clear separation between admin tooling and production data flows.
